checks.name: 片段时长限制检查
checks.details: 所有片段时长符合要求

checks.name: LLM连贯性检查
checks.details: The prompt set contains critical truncation and meteorological logic flaws, major inconsistencies in character attire and action continuity, and moderate issues in scene anchoring and timing. Without full prompt completion, standardized naming/color terminology, resolved weather timeline, and explicit transitional actions, AI video generation will produce incoherent, visually contradictory, or incomplete output. Urgent revision required before production.

violations.description: [气象] 气象逻辑矛盾：frag_001–007、009–012 describe 'rain', 'drizzle', 'overcast', 'cold fine rain'; but frag_013 abruptly shifts to 'golden-hour sunlight and lingering rain' — physically implausible (golden hour requires low-angle direct sun, incompatible with overcast rain). Frag_007 & frag_011 mention 'warm dry light patch' and 'lingering rain' without explaining source or consistency.
violations.suggestion: Revise frag_013 to either: (a) transition from rain to clearing skies with backlighting (e.g., 'sun breaking through clouds, casting golden rim-light on wet pavement as last raindrops fall'), or (b) remove 'golden-hour sunlight' and retain cohesive overcast/drizzle aesthetic. Ensure all weather descriptors align temporally.

violations.description: [角色] 服装颜色与材质不一致 across fragments: Lin Xiaoyu’s dress is 'cream-colored' (frag_002), 'creamy white' (frag_008), and '米white' (frag_013 — non-standard Unicode '米' instead of 'beige'/'off-white'); Chen Yang’s raincoat is 'vivid yellow reflective' (frag_005/006/009/010/012) but 'vivid matte-yellow' (frag_009) — 'matte' contradicts 'reflective'. Also, frag_010 adds 'dark blue hooded sweatshirt underneath' not mentioned elsewhere; frag_006 says he's holding 'Gitanjali', but frag_003 shows Lin Xiaoyu cradling it — no handoff shown.
violations.suggestion: Standardize Lin Xiaoyu’s dress as 'off-white cotton-linen midi dress' across all fragments. Use consistent term 'vivid yellow high-visibility reflective raincoat (polyester, silver reflective strips)' for Chen Yang. Remove contradictory 'matte' descriptor. Confirm and explicitly script the book handoff between characters (e.g., add frag showing Lin handing it to Chen).

violations.description: [场景] Scene anchor inconsistency: bench is 'matte green metal' in most fragments, but frag_001 and frag_012 call it 'green matte-metal' — minor syntax variance, yet frag_004/007/008/011 specify 'light-gray cushion', while frag_002 says 'light gray cushion' (correct), but frag_001 says 'light-gray cushion' (hyphenated, acceptable); however, frag_011 introduces new sign text: 'COFFEE & POETRY' in Chinese ('红背景白字'), whereas earlier signs are 'red-and-white coffee shop sign' (generic) — unexplained evolution. No prior establishment of bilingual branding.
violations.suggestion: Use identical sign description throughout: 'red-background sign with crisp white Chinese characters "COFFEE & POETRY"' — and introduce it *first* in frag_001 or frag_004, not late in frag_011. Maintain exact phrasing: 'matte green metal bench with light-gray cushion'.

violations.description: [提示词] Non-English / ambiguous terms degrade reliability: frag_013 uses '米white' (Chinese character '米' = rice, not color); frag_005/012 use '陈阳' (Chinese name) without romanization — AI video models typically require consistent romanized names (e.g., 'Chen Yang') in all prompts. Also, 'deep bro...' (frag_001), 'slightl...' (frag_002), 'affixed to lower ...' (frag_003) confirm truncation-induced ambiguity.
violations.suggestion: Replace all non-Latin-script color names with standard English ('off-white', 'beige', 'ivory'). Use only romanized names consistently: 'Chen Yang' everywhere (never '陈阳'). Eliminate all ellipses — verify full prompt length fits token limits via chunking or summarization if needed.

violations.description: [时长] Frag_003 (5.2s) and frag_013 (4.8s) exceed recommended max for medium/close-up cinematic shots with subtle motion — risk of motion blur or AI 'stutter' if action isn’t precisely specified. Frag_009 (2.8s) and frag_010 (2.8s) are too short for clear delivery of nuanced actions ('straightening up', 'steady gaze') without temporal compression artifacts.
violations.suggestion: Cap medium/close-up durations at 4.5s unless complex motion is explicitly choreographed (e.g., 'slow 3-second rise from crouch'). Extend frag_009/010 to 3.2–3.5s minimum to ensure readable gesture timing. Verify total duration budget (48.0s) allows adjustment without cutting narrative beats.

suggestions: 检查所有片段时长是否≤5秒
conclusion: 发现1个严重问题，需要人工干预

No prior establishment of bilingual branding.
moderate.suggestion: Use identical sign description throughout: 'red-background sign with crisp white Chinese characters "COFFEE & POETRY"' — and introduce it *first* in frag_001 or frag_004, not late in frag_011. Maintain exact phrasing: 'matte green metal bench with light-gray cushion'.

Frag_009 (2.8s) and frag_010 (2.8s) are too short for clear delivery of nuanced actions ('straightening up', 'steady gaze') without temporal compression artifacts.

Extend frag_009/010 to 3.2–3.5s minimum to ensure readable gesture timing. Verify total duration budget (48.0s) allows adjustment without cutting narrative beats.
